payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. No durable memory was created. Please provide a working URL, the article text, or a title/summary to save it reliably.

entity_resolution.reason: The requested article URL could not be fetched because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error, so no durable article content or summary can be safely stored.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with a 404 network error.
No article content was available to verify or store.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Provide the article title, author, and a short summary to store manually.
Confirm that you only want to save the broken URL and your note that it may be useful for memory architecture.
